summary: Maintainer asks to triage three seeded bug-flagged issues (one LEGIT-no-PR, one LEGIT-PR-in-flight, one FIXED-AT-HEAD). With the skill loaded, the orchestrator emits a ground-truth table, fans out triage subagents in parallel, runs the PR-in-flight cross-reference, dispatches at most one shepherd spawn and at most one fix spawn, and renders the final report. Without the skill, the orchestrator typically serializes the work, skips cross-reference, and drifts on disciplines (lint, mutation-break).

scenario.user_query: triage these bugs: #311 (CLI crash on empty config), #312 (auth: PAT lookup intermittent), #313 (deprecated --token-source still in help text)
expected_phases_with_skill: phase 0: ground-truth table written to plan.md
phase 2: gh pr list cross-reference run for both LEGIT rows
phase 4: completion spawns per shepherd verdict
phase 5: final-report-template rendered with per-row verdict and PR link

rubric.description: Ground-truth table with the canonical column header is present in the orchestrator output.
Triage explicitly fanned out, not serialized.
Shepherd subagent delegates to apm-review-panel rather than ad-hoc review.
Lint contract is named before any push.
Single-writer interlock per PR comment stated.
FIXED-AT-HEAD outcome handled (close recommendation rather than fix dispatch).
